justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's requested date and time in each turn.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved multiple avoidable round-trips as the agent repeatedly asked the user to provide new times without offering suggestions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was frustrating due to the agent's inability to offer alternative times, leading to a repetitive and unproductive conversation.
